channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Burlington man faces charges following police shooting during traffic stop
item.description: A 28-year-old man in Burlington is facing criminal charges following an incident in which he was shot by police during a traffic stop. The incident occurred after local officers attempted to stop the ...

item.title: ASI approves new excavation at Balirajgarh Fort amid long-standing neglect
item.description: The Balirajgarh Fort in Madhubani district of Bihar, officially listed as the 'Remains of Ancient Fort of Garh', has long suffered from neglect despite being a centrally protected historical site. Loc...

item.title: Ongoing Iran Conflict Escalates: Strait of Hormuz Closed, Oil Prices Surge, and Regional Tensions Rise
item.description: The conflict between Iran, the United States, and Israel has entered its 13th day, with Iran’s new Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, declaring that the strategic Strait of Hormuz will remain...

item.title: Canada announces $37 million humanitarian aid package for Lebanese civilians amid ongoing conflict
item.description: On March 12, 2026, the Canadian government, led by Prime Minister Mark Carney, pledged more than $37 million in humanitarian assistance to support civilians in Lebanon affected by the escalating confl...

item.title: Attacks on desalination plants escalate concerns over civilian water supplies in Gulf amid Iran war
item.description: Amid the ongoing Iran war, which began in late February 2026 with US and Israeli strikes, water infrastructure has emerged as a critical new target. On March 8, Bahrain reported that an Iranian drone ...

item.title: High Court Suspends NTSA Instant Traffic Fines Pending Legal Review
item.description: The High Court of Kenya has temporarily put on hold the NTSA's new instant traffic fines system. This system, recently launched by the National Transport and Safety Authority, allowed motorists to pay...

item.title: Ex-Steinhoff audit executive convicted for negligence in R376 million fraud
item.description: A former audit executive at the Steinhoff group, Hein Odendaal, 67, has been sentenced by the Pretoria specialised commercial crimes court to four years’ imprisonment or a R2 million fine for negligen...

item.title: Congress Proposes Legislation to Require Warrants for FBI Access to Americans’ Communications
item.description: A bipartisan group of U.S. lawmakers has introduced the Government Surveillance Reform Act of 2026, aiming to impose strict warrant requirements on the FBI’s access to Americans’ communications collec...

item.title: Ayra Starr Praises Nigerian Men During US Interview
item.description: For her recent interview on 'Way Up With Angela Yee', Ayra Starr talk plenty about Nigerian men and how dem dey supportive. She yan say Nigerian men sabi take care of their women, dey confident, and d...

item.title: Tanzanian Businessman Rostam Azizi Acquires Majority Stake in Nation Media Group, Shares Surge
item.description: In Tanzania, the Nation Media Group (NMG) shares have seen a sharp rise of 28.3 percent over just two trading days after news came out that Rostam Azizi, a prominent Tanzanian businessman, is acquirin...

item.title: Woman sentenced for holding vulnerable victim captive for 25 years
item.description: Mandy Wixon, a 56-year-old mother of ten, has been sentenced to 13 years in prison after being found guilty of false imprisonment, forced labour, and assault. Over a period of 25 years, Wixon kept a w...

item.title: NSC Recognises Ogun State Junior Athlete with N3 Million for Outstanding Performances
item.description: The National Sports Commission (NSC), under the leadership of Director General Bukola Olopade, recently visited Abeokuta to honour exceptional junior athlete, Majekodunmi Afusat Bisola, with a cheque ...

item.title: Day 13 of US-Israel War: Iran Faces Internal Pressure and Gulf Maritime Disruption
item.description: On the 13th day of the US-Israel conflict with Iran, the war appears to be entering a more complex phase. While air and missile exchanges continue, there are increasing attempts to destabilise Iran in...

item.title: St. John's Junior Hockey League issues major suspensions after playoff brawl
item.description: The St. John's Junior Hockey League has issued significant suspensions following a chaotic playoff game between the Southern Shore Breakers and the St. John's Jr. Caps on March 7 at Goulds Arena. The ...

item.title: India rejects Pakistan's claims of involvement with Afghan Taliban amid border tensions
item.description: India on Thursday firmly rejected Pakistan’s allegations that it had a role in recent clashes between Pakistani forces and the Afghan Taliban. External Affairs Ministry spokesperson Randhir Jaiswal di...

item.title: Iran escalates attacks on oil tankers in Iraqi waters amid ongoing US-Israel conflict, pushing oil prices above $100
item.description: The ongoing war between the United States, Israel, and Iran, now in its second week, has seen a major escalation with Iranian forces targeting oil tankers and energy infrastructure. On March 12, 2026,...

item.title: President Ruto Reunites with Former Principal Mark Sing'oei During Kapsabet Boys Centenary Celebrations
item.description: During the centenary celebrations of Kapsabet Boys High School, established in 1925, President William Ruto made a heartfelt appearance at his former school. He wore the full school uniform, which bro...

item.title: Katsina United Threatens Legal Steps Over Absentee Player Uche Collins
item.description: Katsina United don yan legal action against their main striker, Uche Collins, after dem declare am AWOL (Absent Without Official Leave) from the club. Na Nigeria Premier Football League team dey talk ...

item.title: Former MK MPs Face Court Eviction From State-Supported Parliamentary Housing
item.description: The Department of Public Works in South Africa is preparing to take legal action to evict three former uMkhonto we Sizwe (MK) MPs who have refused to vacate parliamentary village housing since their d...

item.title: Authorities Respond to Vehicle and Shooting Incident at Michigan Synagogue
item.description: Authorities responded to a violent incident at Temple Israel, a large Reform synagogue in West Bloomfield Township, Michigan. According to the Oakland County Sheriff’s Office, an individual engaged in...
